headline: Sunday wins. Stick to Huel, earn the rowing machine.
summary: Today you choose discipline over emotion: pre-portioned Huel only, 45 minutes rowing, zero snacking. Your recent -1.1 kg/week proves you can outpace the target if you own Sundays.
details: Eat only Huel today—no emotional snacking, no portion flexibility. Your brain will test you; that's the pattern. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine before afternoon (burns ~1800 kJ, breaks the sedentary trap). Why today matters: you're 167 days behind schedule but crushing last week's pace. Sunday decides whether you keep momentum or reset to zero. One disciplined Sunday compounds into weeks of progress. 120.9 kg doesn't change by accident—it changes by choices like this one.
